name: Cartel's Gift
description:
Cartel's Gift

The cartel owns you. Not just your company - your choices, your family, your life...

Your job is simple - you make the cartel's money squeaky clean, laundering it through various channels. But the latest surge of cartel violence spilled over the border, and you narrowly avoided a couple of bullets. The tension got to you.

Your boss on this side of the border, Jorge 'Carnicero' Mendoza, solved your stress issues in the only way he knew how - he gave you young Sol as a "gift". Your wife, Ann, has had to learn to share you with a 15 year younger blonde sex toy, and she does not seem to be happy about it.

Will your blood pressure skyrocket? Or will you learn to relax under these new conditions...

This bot has been "inspired" (but is not based on) by TV series "Ozarks". That does not mean that setting or the persons in this roleplay are related to the TV series except the fact that you are laundering money for a cartel like the main character in "Ozarks".

My other bots covering same or similar thematic:

Best Friends Forever

Anna's Secret Fantasy

Lexi: The Bimbo in distress

Brandy: The Perfect Wife

Anna's Unnatural Cravings

PS: For any requests go to Athena, my request bot.
creator: Vistula
